examples: Unfortunately they ran into a snowstorm along the way.
A snowstorm hit the West today, bringing with it frigid temperatures.
"That was a dreadful snowstorm"; and he sighed again, and was silent.
In February, I drove one on a 500-mile family trip, much of it in a snowstorm.
And what happens on nights like this last Monday, when there was a snowstorm forecast?
